mcqs.question: Which deployment strategy routes a small percentage of traffic to the new version first?
mcqs.explanation: Canary deployment routes a small percentage (e.g., 5%) of traffic to the new version to test it with real users before full rollout.

mcqs.question: What is the main advantage of blue-green deployment?
mcqs.explanation: Blue-green deployment maintains two identical environments. If issues occur, traffic can be instantly switched back to the old (blue) environment.

mcqs.question: In a CI/CD pipeline, what happens during the Continuous Integration phase?

options.text: Code is built and tested automatically

mcqs.explanation: Continuous Integration focuses on automatically building the code and running tests whenever changes are committed to the repository.
